lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਨ ਹੁਜਤਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amar veparavaahu hai tis naal siaanap na chalee na hujat karanee jaae |
lines.english: The Order of the Lord is beyond challenge. Clever tricks and arguments will not work against it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jam ddandd na lagee haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh eliminates self-conceit from within himself; he shall not be punished by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸੋਈ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sevak soee aakheeai ji sach rahai liv laae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is called a selfless servant, who remains lovingly attuned to the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਸਰਣਾਇ ਪਵੈ ਮੰਨਿ ਲਏ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd saranaae pavai man le rajaae |
lines.english: So abandon your self-conceit, and take to His Sanctuary; accept the Order of His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bahut siaanap haumai meree |
lines.english: Excessive cleverness and egotism are mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਭ ਸੂਰਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: daat jot sabh soorat teree |
lines.english: All gifts, light and beauty are Yours.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ਫੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bahu karam kamaaveh lobh mohi viaape haumai kade na chookai feree |
lines.english: The mortal performs all sorts of rituals in greed and attachment; engrossed in egotsim, he shall never escape the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾਈ ਗਲ ਚੰਗੇਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak aap karaae karataa jo tis bhaavai saaee gal changeree |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator Himself inspires all to act. Whatever pleases Him is good. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach khaanaa sach painanaa sach naam adhaar |
lines.english: Let Truth be your food, and Truth your clothes, and take the Support of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai melaaeaa prabh devanahaar |
lines.english: The True Guru shall lead you to meet God, the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਗੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਨ ਜਾਗਿਆ ਜਪਿਆ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaag pooraa tin jaagiaa japiaa nirankaar |
lines.english: When perfect destiny is activated, the mortal meditates on the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਲਗਿਆ ਤਰਿਆ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sangat lagiaa tariaa sansaar |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall cross over the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sifat salaah kar prabh kaa jaikaar |35|
lines.english: O Nanak, chant God's Praises, and celebrate His Victory. ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਦਾਤਾਰਿ ਹੋਈ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਠਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aradaas sunee daataar hoee sisatt tthar |
lines.english: The Great Giver listened to my prayer, and the world has been cooled and comforted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਜੀਅ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਅਪਣੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਕਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe jeea samaal apanee mihar kar |
lines.english: In Your Mercy, You care for all beings and creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਮੁਚੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਦੁਖ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਭੰਨਿ ਤਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: an paanee much upaae dukh daalad bhan tar |
lines.english: You produce corn and water in abundance; You eliminate pain and poverty, and carry all beings across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਸਫਲੁ ਘਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae prabh kaa safal ghar |1|
lines.english: Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the House of God is fruitful and prosperous. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਵਹੁ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਗਾਇ ਅਪਦਾ ਸਭ ਹਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: levahu kantth lagaae apadaa sabh har |
lines.english: Take me into Your Embrace, and take away all my pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਜਕੁ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਠਾਂਢਿ ਪਈ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: rijak upaaeon agalaa tthaandt pee sansaar |
lines.english: Grain has been produced in abundance; the world is cooled and comforted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੁਠੇ ਮੇਘ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: vutthe megh suhaavane hukam keetaa karataar |
lines.english: Rain is falling from the clouds - it is so beautiful! The Creator Lord issued His Order.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee sache sirajanahaar |
lines.english: O my True Creator Lord God, please shower Your Mercy on me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tan man hariaa hoeaa simarat agam apaar |
lines.english: The mind and body are rejuvenated, meditating in remembrance on the Inaccessible and Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜਹਿ ਸੋ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: keetaa lorreh so kareh naanak sad balihaar |2|
lines.english: He does whatever He pleases; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਆਪਿ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa aap agam hai vaddee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: The Great Lord is Inaccessible; His glorious greatness is glorious!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatadaa aape hai bhaaee |
lines.english: All by Himself, He Himself is pervading everywhere, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee vekh vigasiaa antar saant aaee |
lines.english: Gazing upon Him through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I blossom forth in ecstasy; tranquility comes to my inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਾਥੁ ਸਭ ਨਥੀਅਨੁ ਸਭ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap naath sabh natheean sabh hukam chalaaee |
lines.english: He Himself is the Lord and Master of all. He has subdued all, and all are under the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਸਭ ਚਲੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੩੬॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak har bhaavai so kare sabh chalai rajaaee |36|1| sudh |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord does whatever He pleases. Everyone walks in harmony with His Will. ||36||1|| Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸਾਰੰਗ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag saarang baanee bhagataan kee | kabeer jee |
lines.english: Raag Saarang, The Word Of The Devotees. Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਨਰ ਗਰਬਸਿ ਥੋਰੀ ਬਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa nar garabas thoree baat |
lines.english: O mortal, why are you so proud of small things?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਦਸ ਨਾਜੁ ਟਕਾ ਚਾਰਿ ਗਾਂਠੀ ਐਂਡੌ ਟੇਢੌ ਜਾਤੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man das naaj ttakaa chaar gaantthee ainddau ttedtau jaat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With a few pounds of grain and a few coins in your pocket, you are totally puffed up with pride. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪੁ ਗਾਂਉ ਸਉ ਪਾਏ ਦੁਇ ਲਖ ਟਕਾ ਬਰਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: bahut prataap gaanau sau paae due lakh ttakaa baraat |
lines.english: With great pomp and ceremony, you control a hundred villages, with an income of hundreds of thousands of dollars.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਵਸ ਚਾਰਿ ਕੀ ਕਰਹੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੀ ਜੈਸੇ ਬਨ ਹਰ ਪਾਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: divas chaar kee karahu saahibee jaise ban har paat |1|
lines.english: The power you exert will last for only a few days, like the green leaves of the forest. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਵਨ ਹੂੰ ਤੇ ਅਧਿਕ ਛਤ੍ਰਪਤਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਗਏ ਬਿਲਾਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raavan hoon te adhik chhatrapat khin meh ge bilaat |2|
lines.english: Emperors, even greater than Raawan, passed away in an instant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋਊ ਲੈ ਆਇਓ ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਾ ਕੋਊ ਲੈ ਜਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa koaoo lai aaeo ihu dhan naa koaoo lai jaat |
lines.english: No one has brought this wealth with him, and no one will take it with him when he goes.
